results.rendered_html:
sam-uc-chvas (-ud-√śvas) P. -chvasiti, or -chvasati, to breathe well or regularly,  Suśr. ;
to breathe again, recover, revive,  Kathās. ;
to spring or sprout up,  Śiś.  :
Caus. See sam-ucchvāsita.
